summary.intent: Fix three review comments on PR #591 in the moltis repo: abort in-flight probe tasks on cancellation, show a 'detectionCancelled' string on cancel, and await the cancel RPC while surfacing errors.
summary.outcome: All three review comments were addressed, code passed formatting/lint/clippy/tests, and fixes were committed and pushed to the existing PR branch.

repo: Probe task cancellation uses a JoinSet pattern in crates/chat/src/lib.rs — abort_all() is the correct way to cancel in-flight async tasks on user cancellation.
The frontend cancel flow lives in crates/web/src/assets/js/page-providers.js and must both await the cancel RPC and display a 'detectionCancelled' status string.

code.finding: Switched from FuturesUnordered<JoinHandle> to JoinSet with abort_all() so in-flight probe tasks are properly aborted when cancellation is requested.
Cancel handler now awaits the cancel RPC call and surfaces errors, and shows the 'detectionCancelled' string in the UI on cancellation.

workflow: The project enforces rustfmt, clippy, and JS lint checks before committing — all must pass before pushing fixes.
Review comments were fetched via GitHub API to drive a structured fix plan before touching any code.
